presets.name: German Payslip
presets.description: German Lohn-/Gehaltsabrechnung. Detects Steuerident-Nr., Rentenversicherungs-Nr., Krankenversicherungs-Nr., German dates, German phone numbers and BIC, plus names, addresses and IBAN.

presets.name: Italian Busta Paga
presets.description: Italian payslip. Detects Codice Fiscale, Partita IVA, Matricola INPS, Italian dates, Italian phone numbers and BIC, plus names, addresses and IBAN.

presets.name: US W-2 / Pay Stub
presets.description: US tax forms and pay stubs. Detects SSN, EIN, US dates, ZIP, US phone numbers, bank routing numbers, plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts.

presets.name: Generic Invoice
presets.description: Generic invoice or receipt. Detects invoice numbers, dates, EU VAT IDs, international phone numbers, BIC, plus names, addresses, IBAN, emails. Amounts kept visible by default.

presets.name: Bank Statement
presets.description: Bank or credit card statement. Detects IBAN, BIC/SWIFT, masked & full cards, transaction references, dates, international phone numbers, plus names, addresses, account numbers and amounts.
